column8: It wasn't cold, so we didn't light a fire. If it_________________cold, we'd have lit a fire.
column9: John didn't come, so we didn't do any painting. If John__________________, we'd have done some painting.
column10: Claire didn't buy any clothes because she didn't see anything she liked. Claire_____________some clothes if she'd seen something she liked.
column11: The audience laughed because the joke was very funny. If the joke_____________very funny, the audience wouldn't have laughed.
column12: We decided to leave it was really noisy. We______________to leave if it hadn't been really noisy.
